cards.title: Grid Congestion Emergency
cards.description: Rapid renewable buildout without matching transmission upgrades creates regional congestion. Industrial users face curtailment and must rely on backup generation.

choices.label: Absorb the impact
choices.description: Let the situation play out and take the consequences as they come.

choices.label: Throttle production
choices.description: Cut output to keep emissions down — protecting compliance at a cash cost.

cards.title: Methane Leak Scandal
cards.description: A provincial methane leak scandal triggers intense monitoring and immediate compliance pressure on heavy industry.

choices.label: Absorb the impact
choices.description: Let the situation play out and take the consequences as they come.

choices.label: Buy back on the market
choices.description: Replace the withdrawn allowances by purchasing instead of taking the cut.

cards.title: Imported Technology Failure
cards.description: A promising imported control system underperforms in local operating conditions, forcing costly rework.

choices.label: Absorb the impact
choices.description: Let the situation play out and take the consequences as they come.

choices.label: Defer the cost
choices.description: Postpone the spending, but cutting corners pushes emissions higher this year.

cards.title: Climate Accountability Law
cards.description: A new climate accountability law increases pressure on lagging emitters but improves long-term policy certainty.

cards.description: A temporary tax credit lowers the effective cost of qualifying retrofits.

cards.title: Export Standards Tighten
cards.description: Major buyers require stronger climate disclosures, increasing competitive pressure on exporters.

choices.label: Comply with the ruling
choices.description: Let the situation play out and take the consequences as they come.

choices.label: Pre-comply early
choices.description: Invest now to meet the border standard and blunt the penalty escalation.

cards.title: Just Transition Package
cards.description: A just transition package softens industrial resistance to cap tightening by subsidizing worker reskilling.

cards.title: Managed Cap Relief
cards.description: After industry pushback, regulators offer limited short-term cap relief next year while keeping the long-term trajectory intact.

cards.title: Voluntary Market Convergence
cards.description: Voluntary buyers converge on higher-quality industrial credits, supporting a healthier offset market.

choices.label: Ride it out

choices.label: Hedge with spending
choices.description: Spend to insulate operations from the shifting offset market.

cards.title: Regulatory Crackdown
cards.description: With policy stability collapsing, the Ministry launches an emergency compliance crackdown. Inspectors fan out and the penalty regime hardens across every sector.

choices.label: Fall in line
choices.description: Absorb the tighter regime and protect your licence to operate.

choices.label: Petition the Ministry
choices.description: Spend cash lobbying for a softer rollout.

cards.title: Policy Relief Package
cards.description: A stable, confident regulator rewards the market with a relief package: extra free allowances and a friendlier outlook for investment.

cards.title: CBAM Border Tax Threat
cards.description: The EU signals a Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism that would tax the embedded carbon in your exports. Industry must decide how to respond.

choices.label: Lobby for a delay
choices.description: Coordinate an industry lobbying push — costly now, but it may buy time.

choices.label: Decarbonise to comply
choices.description: Accept the border tax and lean into abatement.

cards.title: CBAM Delayed
cards.description: The lobbying paid off — the border mechanism is pushed back a year, easing immediate pressure and freeing up cash flow.

cards.title: Compliance Deadline Missed
cards.description: A reporting deadline slips through the cracks. The regulator takes note and places your operation under closer scrutiny.

cards.title: Targeted Regulator Audit
cards.description: Now on the watch list, your facility draws a targeted audit. Documentation and remediation carry a real cost.

cards.title: Green Tech Breakthrough
cards.description: A consortium offers early access to a breakthrough abatement technology. Adopting now positions you ahead of the field.

choices.label: Adopt early
choices.description: Invest in the new tech and unlock a first-mover advantage next year.

choices.label: Wait and see
choices.description: Let others take the risk first.

cards.title: Early-Mover Bonus
cards.description: Your early adoption pays off: a green-finance grant rewards first movers with fresh capital.

cards.title: Persistent Drought
cards.description: A multi-year drought throttles hydropower. Thermal plants must run harder, lifting emissions for several years running.

cards.title: Sustained Carbon Price Rally
cards.description: Tightening supply sends carbon prices on a sustained rally that bites into compliance budgets over multiple years.
